name: HTS_SCHEDULE_UNIT_PROCESSES
description: table to store schedule unit process information

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_UNIT_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier for a schedule

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: Schedule Generation profile Id

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Scheduling unit identifier.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_GEN_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Schedule Generation Profile Id of the Schedule Unit

columns.Name: JOB_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Name of schedule process job

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start time of the schedule generation of this schedule unit

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: End time of the schedule generation of this schedule unit

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status of the processing of this unit

columns.Name: JOB_PARAMETERS
columns.Comments: Job Parameters applicable to the given schedule unit

columns.Name: JOB_PARAMETERS_LOB
columns.Comments: Job Parameters, saved as CLOB, applicable to the given schedule unit

columns.Name: JOB_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: PROCESS_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Start time when the schedule generation starts for this schedule unit

columns.Name: PROCESS_END_TIME
columns.Comments: End time of the schedule generation of this schedule unit.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: identifier of enterprise

columns.Name: SCHED_ENGINE_OPTIONS
columns.Comments: SHOWS ALGORITHTM ON WHICH SCHEDULE IS GENERATED

columns.Name: PROCESS_ERROR_CODE
columns.Comments: Error code returned from the scheduling engine

columns.Name: PROCESS_ERROR_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Error category returned from the scheduling engine

columns.Name: PROCESS_ERROR_MSG
columns.Comments: Error message returned from the scheduling engine
